name: anime_portrait_v2
description: Optimized SD1.5 portrait for 6GB VRAM with LoRA stack (anime screencap + hand fix)

prompt_structure.base: masterpiece, best quality, game cg, soft cel shading
prompt_structure.character: 1girl, solo, Hu Tao, twin tails, long dark brown hair in two high ponytails, red eyes with flower-shaped pupils, plum blossom hair ornament, black waistcoat, white collar, red coat
prompt_structure.pose: hands resting at sides, natural standing pose, looking at viewer, slight smile

negative.quality: worst quality, low quality, blurry, ugly, disfigured
negative.anatomy: bad-hands-5, bad anatomy, deformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, mutated hands, extra limbs
negative.composition: multiple people, 2girls, hands behind back, cropped, text, watermark, 3d render, stiff pose, rigid

known_limitations.hands: SD1.5 architecture fundamentally cannot generate perfect hands. Mitigation: hide hands when possible, use hand LoRA, higher resolution.
known_limitations.face_consistency: No identity layer (LoRA-only). For production use, add IP-Adapter with 2D reference art.
known_limitations.vrma: 6GB VRAM limits resolution to ~640x896. Flux/SDXL not viable.
